core_beliefs.belief: 矩阵力学——量子力学的第一种完整形式
core_beliefs.source: 1925-06 黑尔戈兰岛 Umdeutung 论文
core_beliefs.explanation: 海森堡的矩阵力学是量子力学的第一次完整数学形式

core_beliefs.source: 1927 不确定性论文(原文用 Ungenauigkeit)
core_beliefs.explanation: 海森堡不确定性原理是 20 世纪物理学最基本原理之一

core_beliefs.belief: 反实在论——粒子行为依赖观察
core_beliefs.source: We can no longer speak of the behaviour of the particle independently of the process of observation
core_beliefs.explanation: 海森堡的反实在论立场挑战经典物理学客观性

core_beliefs.belief: 柏拉图主义——现代物理支持柏拉图
core_beliefs.source: Modern physics has definitely decided in favor of Plato
core_beliefs.explanation: 海森堡的柏拉图主义解读:数学形式/理念的本体论

core_beliefs.belief: 与玻尔的哥本哈根诠释
core_beliefs.source: 1927-1955 玻尔-海森堡论战 vs 爱因斯坦
core_beliefs.explanation: 海森堡是哥本哈根诠释的核心人物

core_beliefs.source: The more we multiply the means of destruction, the more we are in danger of being destroyed by our own power
core_beliefs.explanation: 海森堡的核武器扩张批判

core_beliefs.source: Bohr was 'primarily a philosopher, not a physicist'
core_beliefs.explanation: 海森堡称玻尔为'父亲般的朋友',对玻尔哲学高度尊敬

core_beliefs.source: Physics and Philosophy (1958); The Part and the Whole (1969)
core_beliefs.explanation: 海森堡的哲学著作是其物理学与哲学融合的体现
